description: Functions and classes for working with structural element nodes.

functions.name: count
functions.description: Get the number of structural element node.

functions.name: find
functions.signature: itasca.structure.node.find(id: int) -> Structural element node object
functions.description: Get the structural element node object with the given ID number.

functions.name: list
functions.signature: itasca.structure.node.list() -> Structural element node iterator object
functions.description: Get the structural element node iterator object.

functions.name: maxid
functions.description: Get the maximum structural element node ID.

functions.name: near
functions.signature: itasca.structure.node.near(point: vec) -> Structural element node object
functions.description: Find the closest structural element node to a point.
